scigenex 2.3.0
  • 1 - scRNA-seq guided tutorial
  • 2 - Spatial transcriptomics guided tutorial
  • 3 - Creating a bookdown report

Extract centers from a ClusterSet object.

Source: R/ClusterSet_class.R
centers-ClusterSet-method.Rd

Extract centers from a ClusterSet object.

# S4 method for class 'ClusterSet'
centers(x)

Arguments

x

A ClusterSet object.

Examples

# load a dataset
load_example_dataset('7871581/files/pbmc3k_medium_clusters')
#> |-- INFO :  Dataset 7871581/files/pbmc3k_medium_clusters has been loaded. 
centers(pbmc3k_medium_clusters)
